title: Surgeon Vacancy at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!
